product.title: TLM Colour Changing Liquid Foundation Hides Wrinkles & Lines, BB Cream Makeup Base Concealer Cover Moisturizing Fluid for all Skin Tone SPF15, Pack of 2
featureBullets: 【SPF 15 Protection】Our foundation cream contain SPF 15 sun protection to shield your skin from harmful UVA and UVB rays.

【Natural-looking Radiance】It was designed for daily use, lightweight and quickly absorbs onto the skin without any dryness or caking, coverage to even skin tone, hide blemishes, won’t clog pores & keeps you shine-free all day

【Moisturises the Skin】It's a tinted moisturizer that evens out skin tone for a natural woke-up-like-this glow. As the makeup is thoroughly blended into skin, it intuitively transforms to your skin tone for all day, natural looking color in your perfect shade.

【Flawless Colour Changing Cream 】Our unique color-matching formula protects and moisturises the skin as it works to even out your complexion. As the makeup is thoroughly blended into skin, it intuitively transforms to your skin tone for all day, natural looking color in your perfect shade.

【Skin Care Treatment】We'd like to say this is a long term skin care more than make up. We hope everyone become healthier by pay more attention to body and beauty. Any problem please kindly contact us through Amazon, we're here for you all daytime.

specification.value: #29,726 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #276 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation to be the best they've used, appreciating its lightweight feel and flawless blending with skin tone. The color match receives mixed feedback - while some say it matches their skin perfectly, others report it doesn't match their face. The coverage and effectiveness also get mixed reviews, with some finding it covers well while others say it doesn't cover blemishes, and some saying it works well while others report it doesn't work at all. The moisturizing properties and fragrance receive mixed reactions, with some finding it very moisturizing while others say it makes their skin feel greasy, and some noting a strong scent.

reviews.reviewText: Great part of my daily makeup routine! Great for skin no pimples not sticky color matches pretty well but only decent protection
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 26, 2026

reviews.reviewText: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ I was looking for a foundation that would adjust to my skin tone, and this one truly delivers! The formula goes on white and then seamlessly transforms to match my complexion — it looks natural and flawless every time. ✨ What I love: Built-in SPF 15 for everyday protection Lightweight feel that doubles as a moisturizer Absorbs quickly with no dryness or caking I honestly don’t have any cons to mention. It’s a perfect everyday foundation and I love how effortless it makes my routine. Highly recommend!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 4, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Probably best for light-skinned individuals, light cover
reviews.reviewText: Why did you pick this product vs others?: This product has a light coverage that gives a nice smooth blended look. It's not designed to cover broken capillaries or heavier discoloration, but for minor discolorations, this foundation will smooth those out and looks quite nice. My biggest issue with it was the kind of odd fragrance, not awful, but definitely not something you'd find in most foundations. I kept thinking that I'd smelled this odor before, but couldn't figure out where. Then, it hit me, it smelled just like my dentist's office! lol. So, it isn't a horrible smell, but it is definitely medicinal. I probably wouldn't buy it again because I have some small spider veining around my nose that it doesn't cover. Another big thing is that it is very pale, so I think this foundation would work mostly for light-skinned individuals (which I am) with minor facial imperfections. It does look incredibly natural on my face, so I'm finishing the product out with a concealer in spots. Conclusion: If you're a light-skinned individual looking for light coverage, this gives a very pretty finish if the fragrance appeals to you. It does smooth out light imperfections and doesn't look like you're wearing makeup, even in full sunlight.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 5, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I am still trying to figure out the best color for my skin tone. The foundation really feels good on my skin & has pretty good coverage for daily use. I like a bit more coverage if I am going out! It’s not too oily or “cakey” on my skin. I will continue to reorder.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 5, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is great product! Goes on smoothly and it spreads great. When you finished your face looks beautiful . I love it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: This stuff really works for older skin
reviews.reviewText: I like the idea of this so I ordered a more expensive one. It was taking too long to come so I canceled it and ordered this one and I love it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I’m 62, fair skin with ruddy cheeks. Hate to wear foundation because of how it feels on my skin and finding a match is so difficult! Was looking for a lightweight product to even-out my skin tone. Decided to apply only to one side of my face, for comparison. Used very little of the product and applied using a makeup sponge, as per packaging recommendations: *large pores on my nose and cheek were less visible *redness on my cheek was reduced *shadow under my eye was lightened. *pleasantly surprised that it covered a blemish at my jawline. *did not “sink into” the wrinkles/scars at the corner of my mouth (pictures are of me wearing this product alone, no other makeup or concealer was applied)
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 19, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I don’t find the coverage as good as I want, it goes on white and blends into your pigment. I am very fair skinned, so it made me look even more pale unless I mixed with my old foundation. I also felt the coverage did not last long. I did not find it helpful with lines and wrinkles Applied easily. Price is reasonable for the product
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 11, 2026
